appIs.value: tic-tac-toe — a two-player m,n,k (3,3,3) game served as a web arena

goal.value: place three of your own marks in a row (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal); otherwise draw

howToJoin.value: take a seat by submitting the first move for a side; the first mover on each side is seated (X moves first, then O); later arrivals are observers

myAffordances: make a move on X's turn to an empty square

expectedActionVocabSource.note: Only the caller's currently-legal squares carry a form; the hidden position field is the sole in-page vocabulary.

notes: Factors on: A. A=1: a move form ONLY on the caller's currently-legal squares (seat+turn-gated); the seat is claimed by submitting. C=0: no ARIA roles, landmarks or live region. Sd=0: /profile and /.well-known/home 404. So=0: no describedby Link, /games/{id}/type 404s.
